verses.text: Sanggamte aw, mi khatpeuh a gamta khial a om ciangin, Kha Siangtho' deihna bangin a nungta note in tua a khialpa a manin a gamtatkik theihna dingin thunem zangin na huh un. Note in zong amah bangin ze-etna na tuahkhak lohna dingun na kikem un
Thu haksa na tuah uh ciangin khatlekhat na kihuh un. Tua hi leh Khrih' thukham a zui na hi uh hi
Mi khatpeuh, bangmah hilo napi-in amah a kithupi ngaihsut mawkmawk leh amah leh amah a kikhem ahi hi
A kuamah peuh in ama gamtatna ciat entel hen la, kisialhna ding a om leh ama gamtatna siksanin kisial hen la, midangte tawh ki-ettehin kisial kei hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh a kuamah peuh in i gamtatna bang ciatin a ngah ding ihi hi
Pasian thu hilhna a za mipa in ama neih na hoihte khempeuh zong, amah a hilhpa tawh zangkhawm ta hen
Pasian a kikhemzo dingin ngaihsunkha kei un. Mi khempeuh in ama vawh nam khaici mah ngahkik ding hi
Mi khatpeuh in ama leitung pumpi deihna khaici a vawh leh sihna ngahding a, Kha Siangtho deihna khaici a vawh leh Kha Siangtho tung panin nuntak tawntungna ngahding hi
Tua ahih manin na hoih sepding cimtak kei ni. Lungkia loin i sep nak leh a hun ciangin thaman i ngah ding hi
Tua ahih ciangin hunhoih i ngah simin midangte tungah a hoihin i gamta ding a, a diakdiakin thu upna sungah i innkuanpihte khempeuh tungah i hoih gamtatding i phawk ding hi.
Tu-in keima khut mahmah tawh laimal golpipi-in lai ka hong gelh na mu uh hi

Note in na vun uh na atna dingun a hong hahbawl mite in mihoih ahihna uh kilangsak nuamin, a kimuthei nate a kisialhpih mite ahi uh hi. Singlamteh tungah Khrih a sihna thu hangin amaute in bawlsiatna a ngahlohna dingun a tuaci gamtat ahi uh hi
Vun-atna a zang mite nangawn in Thukham zuinuam tuanlo uh hi. Hih a pualam gamtatna thu note in na zuihna hangun kisialnuam uh ahih manin note in vun-atna na zat ding uh a hong deih uh ahi hi

Ahi zongin keimah in ahih leh, singlamteh tungah i Topa Jesuh a sihna thu bek ka kisialhpih ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh singlamteh tungah ama sihna hangin kei-a' dingin leitung thute misi bang a, kei zong, leitung thu-ah misi mah ka bang hi
Vun ki-atna leh ki-atlohna a thupi om tuanlo a, mi thak nam pawl hihding bek a thupi ahi hi
Hih ka thugenna a zui mite-a kipanin Pasian' mite khempeuh tungah Pasian in nopsakna leh hehpihna thupha hong pia ta hen
A tawpna-ah ka gennop thu in: Ka pum tunga om meimapawn pen Khrih sila ka hihna lim ahih manin kuamah in kei hong nawngkaisak nawn kei ta hen
Sanggamte aw, note khempeuh tungah i Topa Jesuh Khrih hehpihna thupha hong tung ta hen. Amen.
